text.title: Kubernetes Load Balancing: Services, Ingress, Probes Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Cloud LB cost explodes; one LB per workload.
antipattern.fix: Use ClusterIP + a single Ingress; LoadBalancer for the Ingress only.

antipattern.symptom: Rolling deploy drops traffic for 5-10s per pod.
antipattern.root-cause: Missing readiness; traffic hits pods not yet warm.
antipattern.fix: Add readiness probe checking real dependencies.

antipattern.symptom: WebSocket clients see RST during rollout.
